name: telemem
description: TeleMem is a high-performance drop-in replacement for Mem0, featuring semantic deduplication, long-term dialogue memory, and multimodal video reasoning.
summaryZh: TeleMem is a high-performance drop-in replacement for Mem0, featuring semantic deduplication, long-term dialogue memory, and multimodal video reasoning. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
